ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the event took place */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event (e.g., championship, regional) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the event */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Long description of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "event_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event version was created */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Event name at the time of version creation */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Event date at the time of version creation */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the event at the time of version creation */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Long description of the event at the time of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's nationality */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's club */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the athlete */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the club is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Club website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Club address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., W50B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "place" TEXT /* Placement of the athlete */,
  "result_time" REAL /* Result time of the athlete */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result (e.g., DNF, None) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, athlete, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete receiving the award */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)
